esv_version: The LORD is a stronghold for the oppressed, a stronghold in times of trouble.
niv_version: The LORD is a refuge for the oppressed, a stronghold in times of trouble.
reflection: When things feel hard or scary, God is your strong safe place. He protects you and keeps you steady. You can run to Him and feel secure.
live_it_out:
1. When something feels hard, say "God, You are my safe place."
2. Imagine running into His strong arms.
3. Thank Him for protecting you today.

esv_version: This God—his way is perfect.
niv_version: This God—his way is perfect.
reflection: God’s way is always perfect and good. He knows the best path for you. You can trust Him completely.
live_it_out:
1. Say "Your way is perfect, God" today.
2. Follow one gentle choice He shows you.
3. Feel happy trusting His perfect way.

esv_version: Lead me in your truth and teach me.
niv_version: Guide me in your truth and teach me.
reflection: God wants to lead you in what is true and teach you every day. He is the best teacher. You can ask Him to show you the way.
live_it_out:
1. Ask God "Lead me in Your truth today."
2. Listen for His gentle teaching.
3. Do one true and kind thing.

esv_version: Be strong, and let your heart take courage.
niv_version: Be strong and take heart.
reflection: God tells you to be strong and let your heart be brave. He gives you courage when you need it. You are braver than you think because He is with you.
live_it_out:
1. Say "I am strong because God is with me."
2. Try something a little brave today.
3. Thank Him for giving you courage.

esv_version: Your steadfast love, O LORD, extends to the heavens.
niv_version: Your love, LORD, reaches to the heavens.
reflection: God’s love reaches higher than the sky and never ends. It covers you every single day. You are wrapped in His big, steady love.
live_it_out:
1. Look up at the sky and remember God’s love.
2. Say "Your love reaches the heavens!"
3. Share a little of that love with someone.

esv_version: Hope in God.
niv_version: Put your hope in God.
reflection: When you put your hope in God, your heart feels light and full of good things coming. He never lets you down. Hope in Him brings joy.
live_it_out:
1. Say "I put my hope in You, God."
2. Think of one good thing you hope for.
3. Feel happy because of His hope.

esv_version: O God, you are my God.
niv_version: You, God, are my God.
reflection: God is your very own God. He belongs to you and you belong to Him. That makes every day feel special and safe.
live_it_out:
1. Say "You are my God" with a smile.
2. Feel close to Him all day.
3. Thank Him for being yours.

esv_version: For you, O Lord, are my hope.
niv_version: For you have been my hope, Sovereign LORD.
reflection: God is your hope every day. He is the One you can count on no matter what. Your hope in Him makes you strong inside.
live_it_out:
1. Say "You are my hope, God" today.
2. Remember Him when you feel unsure.
3. Feel strong because of His hope.

esv_version: I will sing of the steadfast love of the LORD forever.
niv_version: I will sing of the LORD’s great love forever.
reflection: You can sing about God’s never-ending love forever. It is a happy song that never gets old. He loves when you sing it.
live_it_out:
1. Sing a little song about God’s love.
2. Say "Your love lasts forever!"
3. Share the song with someone.

esv_version: The steadfast love of the LORD is from everlasting to everlasting.
niv_version: But from everlasting to everlasting the LORD’s love is with those who fear him.
reflection: God’s love lasts from forever ago to forever from now. It is always with you. You can rest in His endless love.
live_it_out:
1. Say "Your love lasts forever, God."
2. Hug yourself and feel His love.
3. Tell someone about His forever love.

esv_version: Oh give thanks to the LORD, for he is good.
niv_version: Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good.
reflection: God is good, and saying thank you to Him makes your heart happy. He loves your thank-yous. Every day has something to thank Him for.
live_it_out:
1. Say thank you to God for one good thing.
2. Count three things you are thankful for.
3. Share your thankfulness at dinner.

esv_version: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom.
niv_version: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom.
reflection: Loving and respecting God is the start of being wise. He gives you smart and kind thoughts. You can grow wiser with Him.
live_it_out:
1. Show God respect with a quiet "I love You."
2. Ask Him to help you be wise.
3. Choose kind words today.

esv_version: The LORD has done great things for us.
niv_version: The LORD has done great things for us.
reflection: God has done great things for you and your family. He keeps doing good things every day. Remembering them makes your heart glad.
live_it_out:
1. Name one great thing God did for you.
2. Say "Thank You for great things, God."
3. Tell a grown-up about it.

esv_version: The LORD takes pleasure in those who fear him.
niv_version: The LORD takes pleasure in those who fear him.
reflection: God smiles with pleasure when you love and respect Him. He is happy just because you are His. You make His heart glad.
live_it_out:
1. Say "I want to make You happy, God."
2. Do one thing that shows you love Him.
3. Feel happy knowing He is pleased.

esv_version: I love those who love me.
niv_version: I love those who love me.
reflection: God loves you back when you love Him. His love is big and true. Loving Him makes your heart feel full.
live_it_out:
1. Tell God "I love You" today.
2. Show love to Him by obeying happily.
3. Feel His love coming back to you.

esv_version: The word of our God will stand forever.
niv_version: The word of our God endures forever.
reflection: God’s words last forever and never change. They are strong and true. You can trust the Bible every day.
live_it_out:
1. Listen to one Bible verse today.
2. Say "God’s words last forever."
3. Remember them when you need help.

esv_version: When you pass through the waters, I will be with you.
niv_version: When you pass through the waters, I will be with you.
reflection: Even when things feel like deep water, God promises to be right with you. He will not let you go under. You are safe with Him.
live_it_out:
1. Say "You are with me, God" when worried.
2. Hold His promise close.
3. Feel safe because He is near.

esv_version: I will not forget you.
niv_version: I will not forget you.
reflection: God promises He will never forget you. He thinks about you all the time with love. You are always on His mind.
live_it_out:
1. Say "God, thank You for never forgetting me."
2. Remember He is thinking of you.
3. Feel loved and remembered.

esv_version: You are the light of the world.
niv_version: You are the light of the world.
reflection: Jesus says you are a light in the world. When you are kind and loving, you shine for Him. Your light makes others happy.
live_it_out:
1. Shine your light by being kind today.
2. Smile so others see Jesus’ light.
3. Thank God for making you a light.

esv_version: I am with you always.
niv_version: I am with you always.
reflection: Jesus promises to be with you every single day and all the time. You are never alone. His presence makes you feel safe and loved.
live_it_out:
1. Say "Jesus, thank You for being with me."
2. Talk to Him like He is right there.
3. Feel happy because He is always near.

esv_version: I came that they may have life and have it abundantly.
niv_version: I have come that they may have life, and have it to the full.
reflection: Jesus came so you can have a full and happy life. He gives you joy and good things every day. Life with Him is the best.
live_it_out:
1. Say "Thank You for full life, Jesus."
2. Enjoy one happy thing today.
3. Share His joy with a friend.

esv_version: I am the way, and the truth, and the life.
niv_version: I am the way and the truth and the life.
reflection: Jesus is the way to go, the truth to believe, and the life you need. He shows you everything good. Follow Him happily.
live_it_out:
1. Say "Jesus, You are the way."
2. Ask Him to show you the right path.
3. Feel safe walking with Him.

esv_version: I am the vine; you are the branches.
niv_version: I am the vine; you are the branches.
reflection: Jesus is like a vine and you are a branch connected to Him. When you stay close, you grow strong and full of life. He helps you.
live_it_out:
1. Picture yourself close to Jesus the vine.
2. Talk to Him so you stay connected.
3. Feel His life flowing to you.

esv_version: God's love has been poured into our hearts.
niv_version: God’s love has been poured out into our hearts.
reflection: God pours His love right into your heart. It fills you up and never runs out. You can feel it every day.
live_it_out:
1. Say "Thank You for pouring love into my heart."
2. Feel His love inside you.
3. Share some of that love today.

esv_version: If God is for us, who can be against us?
niv_version: If God is for us, who can be against us?
reflection: God is on your side, so nothing can really win against you. He is bigger and stronger than anything. You are safe with Him.
live_it_out:
1. Say "God is for me!"
2. Feel brave because He is on your side.
3. Tell a friend God is for them too.

esv_version: So, whether you eat or drink, or whatever you do, do all to the glory of God.
niv_version: So whether you eat or drink or whatever you do, do it all for the glory of God.
reflection: Everything you do—even eating or playing—can be for God’s glory. It makes ordinary things special. He is pleased with you.
live_it_out:
1. Say "I do this for You, God" before you eat or play.
2. Do one thing today to honor Him.
3. Feel happy knowing it pleases God.

esv_version: If anyone is in Christ, he is a new creation.
niv_version: If anyone is in Christ, the new creation has come.
reflection: When you are with Jesus, you become brand new inside. He makes everything fresh and good. You are His new creation.
live_it_out:
1. Say "I am new in Jesus!"
2. Thank Him for making you new.
3. Show one new kind thing today.

esv_version: For we are his workmanship.
niv_version: For we are God’s handiwork.
reflection: You are God’s beautiful workmanship—made by His own hands with love. He created you on purpose and He is proud of you.
live_it_out:
1. Say "I am God’s handiwork!"
2. Thank Him for making you special.
3. Feel loved and wonderfully made.

esv_version: Whatever is true, whatever is honorable... think about these things.
niv_version: Whatever is true, whatever is noble... think about such things.
reflection: God wants you to think about good, true, and beautiful things. It fills your mind with peace and joy. He helps you choose good thoughts.
live_it_out:
1. Think about one true and good thing today.
2. Say kind thoughts about others.
3. Ask God to help your thinking.

esv_version: See what kind of love the Father has given to us.
niv_version: See what great love the Father has lavished on us.
reflection: God the Father has given you the greatest love ever. He calls you His child. That love is huge and wonderful.
live_it_out:
1. Say "God loves me like His child!"
2. Give yourself a gentle hug.
3. Share His love with one person today.
